name: Context Hub
description: Curated API documentation via Context Hub CLI for coding-oriented agents

enabled.label: Enable Context Hub
enabled.help: Enable curated API doc fetching via chub CLI

lang_default.label: Default language
lang_default.help: Default language variant for docs (py or js)

global_annotations_path.label: Global annotations path
global_annotations_path.help: Shared annotations directory across all Volos agents

search_timeout.label: Search timeout
search_timeout.help: Timeout in seconds for chub search

get_timeout.label: Get timeout
get_timeout.help: Timeout in seconds for chub get

annotate_timeout.label: Annotate timeout
annotate_timeout.help: Timeout in seconds for chub annotate
